hooks.prompt:
A commit is about to be made. Check if docs/MANUAL.md needs updating.

1. Run `git diff --cached --name-only` to see what files are being committed.
2. If any files in src/aura/acp/, src/aura/brain.gleam, src/aura/brain_tools.gleam, src/aura/scheduler.gleam, src/aura/config.gleam, src/aura/supervisor.gleam, src/aura/skill.gleam, src/aura/structured_memory.gleam, or src/aura/conversation.gleam changed, read the relevant section of docs/MANUAL.md.
3. Compare the staged changes against what the manual says. Is the manual still accurate?
4. If docs/MANUAL.md is already in the staged files, check that the updates are consistent with the code changes.

Return {"ok": true} if the manual is accurate or doesn't need updating (e.g. test-only changes, comments, formatting).
Return {"ok": false, "reason": "<which section needs updating and why>"} if the manual is now stale.
